title: METS_Blade
description: Port the Electric Slash blades from the IC2 addon "More Electric Tools" to higher versions (1.20.1).
body:
# ⚡ Mod Introduction 
Remember the Electric SlashBlades from [METS](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-electric-tools) back in the 1.12.2 days—Bloody Innovation, Craft Renaissance?

Yes, you heard it right! These legendary blades have now been taken over and ported to Minecraft 1.20.1 by the current author!

## ✨ Mod Features

### 🔋 Energy-Driven Combat
Faithfully retains the classic energy-based durability mechanics, now adapted to modern energy systems (EU → FE).

### 🧪 Tech Mod Compatibility
Compatible with major energy storage units, allowing seamless integration with tech mods like [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) and [Thermal](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-expansion). Multiple energy cells can be used to charge your blades.

### 📦 Classic Skills
Perfectly ports the original SA (Special Arts) and SE (Special Effects) from the original electric slash blades, including iconic abilities like the Hyper System and High-Speed Phantom Blade-γ.

### 🛠️ Refined for Modern Versions

Fixes various legacy bugs and optimizes crafting logic. Now, when crafting a slash blade, it will inherit the energy stored in the crafting materials used.

## 📌 Important Notes

### ⚠️ Recipe Dependency: All slash blade recipes in this mod require Mekanism and Mekanism Generators to be installed. Without these two mods, none of the blades from this mod will be registered in the recipe list!

Ported with permission from the original author of the IC2 addon "More Electric Tools" (METS). Original mod created for Minecraft 1.7.10–1.12.2. All credits go to the original author.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1464525/description_c70f0ffc-32b9-4461-98f6-7073af4a6fa5.png)
